basic_details.job_title: IIT Goa Part Time Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Goa (IIT Goa)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Goa (IIT Goa) Part Time Medical Officer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT Goa. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Goa Part Time Medical Officer Recruitment 2026. Candidates who have M.B.B.S. Degree with Compulsory Rotating Medical Internship (CRMI) from an NMC/MCI recognized university are eligible to apply for these Part Time Medical Officer vacancies. Eligible candidates can attend the walk-in interview for IIT Goa Part Time Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 on 19 May 2026. Candidates can download the officia

qualification.education_qualification: M.B.B.S. Degree with Compulsory Rotating Medical Internship (CRMI) from NMC/MCI recognized university
qualification.details: Part Time Medical Officer : Essential: M.B.B.S. Degree with Compulsory Rotating Medical Internship (CRMI) from NMC/MCI recognized university. Desirable: One-year of experience after M.B.B.S. Degree, Doctor of Medicine.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the IIT Goa recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the IIT Goa recruitment is Part-Time Medical Officer. This is a part-time position.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Part-Time Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Part-Time Medical Officer post at IIT Goa.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Part-Time Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Part-Time Medical Officer position is Rs.39,900/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the essential qualifications required for the Part-Time Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The essential qualification is an M.B.B.S. Degree with Compulsory Rotating Medical Internship (CRMI) from an NMC/MCI recognized university.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the walk-in interview date for the Part-Time Medical Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview date for the Part-Time Medical Officer recruitment is 19 May 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the location for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Indian Institute of Technology Goa, Ponda, Goa - 403401.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment is a Walk-in Interview.
